page_title.landing: CSC Career Compass — Discover your career fit in LA

landing.h1: Discover your skills, interests, and best-fit careers.
landing.subhead: An ~8-minute self-discovery tool for Los Angeles. Free. No account. Private.
landing.bullet_outcome: You'll get a 1-page summary of who you are at work — your interests, passions, and strengths — plus sample LA roles to explore
landing.bullet_private: Stays on your phone — nothing sent to a server
landing.draft_banner: This translation is still being reviewed. The English version is available.

footer.disclaimer: This is a starting point, not professional career counseling. For personalized guidance, talk to your CSC Employment Outreach Specialist.

survey.pick_one_each: Please answer every item to continue.
survey.pick_one_per_row: Please choose one option for each row.

interests_likert.title: Step 1a: What kind of work do you like?
interests_likert.why: This helps us see what kind of work draws you.

interests_tags.title: Step 1b: Words that describe you at work
interests_tags.why: Tap up to 5 words that fit how you like to work.
interests_tags.skip_hint: You can skip this — or tap any words that fit you.

interests_visual.title: Step 1c: Where would you feel at home?
interests_visual.why: Pick the one workspace that feels most like you.

passions.title: Step 2: What are you passionate about?
passions.why: These are things you'd do even when no one is watching. Pick 3.

strengths.title: Step 3: What comes easily to you?
strengths.why: These show what comes naturally to you.

values.title: Step 4: What energizes you at work?
values.why: These tell us what you need at work to feel like yourself. Pick 3.

skills.title: Step 5: Your soft skills
skills.why: These are skills you've built up over time.

constraints.title: Step 6: A few practical questions
constraints.why: This helps us match you to jobs you can take on right now.

barriers.title: Optional: A few things your specialist should know
barriers.why: These help your CSC Specialist match you with the right support and funding. Tap any that fit — skip any you'd rather not share.
barriers.skip_hint: Stays on your phone. Only shared if you bring your PDF to your specialist.

modules.tot_intro: Quick break — which one sounds better to you?

results.title: Your Career Compass
results.section_a_title: What you told us about yourself
results.section_b_intro: These are the kinds of work that match your interests. The sample LA roles below are starting points to explore with your CSC Specialist — not a prescription.
results.no_samples_in_area: No sample roles match your current constraints in this area. Your CSC Specialist can help you explore options.
results.barriers_callout_h: Things to discuss with your CSC Specialist
results.barriers_callout_intro: You shared the following — your specialist can help connect you to the right support and funding:
results.passions_lead: These are things you'd do even when no one is watching.
results.attrs_lead: These are what you said you need to feel like yourself at work.
results.strengths_empty: You said everything is still developing — that's a great starting point. Your CSC Specialist can help you spot strengths you may be overlooking.
results.soft_empty: You said your soft skills are still growing — many people understate these. Your CSC Specialist can help you name the ones you already use.
results.growing_lead: These are skills you said you're still developing.
results.pdf_helper: Take this to your CSC appointment. You can also print it or send it to family.
results.specialist_note: Bring this to your CSC Employment Specialist. They can help you plan training, funding, and the next steps.
results.restart_note: Done? Try it again with different answers:
results.wage_legend: Starting pay → typical hourly pay in LA · months to get certified. Data: BLS, May 2024 (LA area).
